steps.title: Compare both disadvantages
steps.content: The student wants to compare the disadvantages of the geothermal systems used at both plants. The Wayang Windu plant uses a flash steam system, whose disadvantage is that it requires geothermal reservoirs above \(180^\circ\text{C}\), limiting where the system can be used. The Raft River plant uses a binary cycle system, which works with lower-temperature reservoirs but has the disadvantage of higher maintenance costs.

steps.title: Reject one-sided comparisons
steps.content:
• Choice A names only the Raft River system's cost disadvantage and does not compare both systems' drawbacks.
  • Choice B names only the Wayang Windu system's need for hotter reservoirs.
  • Choice D contrasts the systems' temperature requirements but leaves out the Raft River system's higher maintenance costs.
The remaining option compares Wayang Windu's temperature limitation with Raft River's maintenance-cost disadvantage. The answer is C.
